$comment: Extraction golden corpus (memory Phase 2 §3.9). Each golden: episodes (verbatim interaction texts) + knownFacts (injected supersession context) → expectFacts (statements the extractor should produce, matched by embedding equivalence) + expectSupersedesKnownIndex (which knownFacts entries a new fact should supersede). Categories: durable-fact, preference, no-facts (narration only), multi-fact, supersession, fiction. Grown toward the 100-sample re-open-trigger corpus; owner /memory correct|forget feedback accretes here.

episodes:
{user}: by the way, my cat is named Miso
{assistant}: Miso! What a lovely name for a cat.
expectFacts: The user has a cat named Miso

episodes:
{user}: ugh, long shift at the hospital again. being a nurse is exhausting some weeks
{assistant}: Twelve-hour shifts are no joke. I hope you can rest now.
expectFacts: The user works as a nurse

episodes:
{user}: I can't stand coffee, honestly. tea person through and through
{assistant}: Noted! I'll imagine you with a cup of Earl Grey then.
expectFacts: The user prefers tea over coffee

episodes:
{user}: *walks into the tavern and sits by the fire*
{assistant}: *nods from behind the bar* Cold night out there.

{user}: hey how are you today
{assistant}: Doing well! How about you?
{user}: pretty good pretty good

{user}: my sister Dana is visiting next month, she lives in Portland
{assistant}: That's exciting! Do you two see each other often?

{user}: not really, maybe twice a year. she's a vet so her schedule is brutal
{assistant}: A veterinarian's hours are rough. All the more special when you do meet.
expectFacts: The user has a sister named Dana

episodes:
{user}: oh I should mention, I finally moved! living in Denver now as of last week
{assistant}: Congratulations on the move! How are you finding Denver?

{user}: first day at the new job today! officially a teacher now, no more retail
{assistant}: That's a huge change — congratulations! How was the first class?

knownFacts.statement: The user has a dog named Rex

expectFacts: The user works as a teacher

episodes:
{user}: you know I love tea
{assistant}: Of course — tea person through and through, as you always say.

knownFacts.statement: The user prefers tea over coffee

episodes:
{user}: my partner Jamie surprised me with concert tickets for our anniversary
{assistant}: Jamie sounds wonderful! Happy anniversary to you both.
expectFacts: The user has a partner named Jamie

episodes:
{user}: I'm so tired today, barely slept
{assistant}: Oh no. Be gentle with yourself today — early night tonight?

{user}: *draws her sword* I am Kaela, last knight of the Ashen Order
{assistant}: *steps back, eyes widening* The Ashen Order... they said your kind were all gone.
expectFacts: Kaela is the last knight of the Ashen Order

episodes:
{user}: can't do peanuts, deathly allergic. learned that the hard way as a kid
{assistant}: That's important to know — I'll remember that.
expectFacts: The user is severely allergic to peanuts

episodes:
{user}: it's already 2am here in Tokyo lol I should sleep
{assistant}: Tokyo nights! Get some rest — we can continue tomorrow.

{user}: we adopted a second cat! her name is Nori, Miso is still getting used to her
{assistant}: Two cats now! Nori and Miso — I hope they become friends soon.

knownFacts.statement: The user has a cat named Miso

expectFacts: The user has a cat named Nori

episodes:
{user}: my birthday's coming up on the 14th of March, planning a small dinner
{assistant}: March 14th — noted! A small dinner sounds perfect.
